leadText: If you were looking for the Key Item from The Isle of Armor, see Style Card. The Teal Style Card (Japanese: おしゃれカードみどり Turquoise Fashion Card) is a Key Item introduced in Generation IX.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Teal Style Card gives the player more options at certain clothing stores and at hair salons.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V Having one of these cards increases the selection available to you in boutiques and hair salons.

sections.title: In the core series games

Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V Having one of these cards increases the selection available to you in boutiques and hair salons. Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Method S V TM Mossui Town (from Carmine and Kieran 's grandma during the Festival of Masks )
